# tabs

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Tabs surface arrangement — one fullscreen tab at a time (the default keep-alive surface).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `SurfaceArrangement.Variant` "Tabs" → `AppTabsBody`
  - Uses: `apps.AppTabsBody`, `apps/surface-arrangement.SurfaceArrangement`
